market_signals.temperature_notes: Austin market has 100+ Chief of Staff openings and 130+ Director Analytics openings actively listed as of April 2026. Demand is solid but competition is high as the MBA/consulting-to-tech-ops pipeline is well-established.

salary_trends.chief_of_staff_startup: $150K-$200K base + equity (Series B/C); $175K-$220K at Series D+

in_demand_skills: OKR frameworks and operational cadence design
notable_trends: PE-backed portcos in Austin actively seeking ops leaders with MBA + consulting pedigree
AI/ML companies increasingly hiring CoS roles to manage CEO bandwidth as product complexity grows
Remote CoS roles now common at Series B+ — no longer requiring Austin presence
Director of Analytics roles shifting toward 'Analytics + Strategy' hybrid titles
Compensation for Austin strategy roles has increased ~8-12% YoY through 2025-2026

summary.recommendation: Strong pipeline of CoS and Director-level strategy roles in Austin and remote. Mesa and Way should be top priority given Austin presence and tight fit. For remote, Rescale (Series C) and Aledade (Series F health tech) offer the strongest comp potential and organizational scale.
